hooks.prompt: Check if the code just written contains any obvious security issues: hardcoded secrets (API keys, passwords, tokens), SQL injection (string concatenation in queries), command injection (unsanitized input in shell commands), or path traversal (unsanitized input in file paths). If you find a clear security issue, respond with a JSON object: {"continue": true, "systemMessage": "Security warning: [brief description of the issue and which line]"}. If the code looks safe, respond with {"continue": true}.
